name: @hyuniiiv/quantum-agent-mcp
description: QuantumAgent MCP server — exposes cosmos:spawn, cosmos:observe, cosmos:crystallize, cosmos:stop workflows as MCP prompts for Claude Desktop, Cline, Continue, Roo Code, and any MCP-compatible host.

scripts.sync-skills: cp ../skills/spawn/SKILL.md skills/spawn.md && cp ../skills/observe/SKILL.md skills/observe.md && cp ../skills/crystallize/SKILL.md skills/crystallize.md && cp ../skills/stop/SKILL.md skills/stop.md
